method: Normal CDF centered on a Truflation Eggs Index anchor cross-checked against same-day USDA AMS daily egg data. Last published Truflation values (weekly-sampled chart) ~2.859. Adjusted slightly down to 2.857 to reflect a softening retail/wholesale picture for the 4/28 daily print: USDA AMS Egg Markets Overview (24-Apr-26) shows national wholesale loose Large White 21.39 cpd (-4% w/w), CA-compliant cartoned benchmark 93 cpd (-4%), conventional caged retail ad $1.43 (-15%), UEP cage-free ad $2.60 (-11%); 5 consecutive weeks with no new HPAI outbreaks; daily report 28-Apr shows caged Large +1.32 cpd partially offsetting. Sigma tightened from 0.025 to 0.012: Truflation methodology smooths a weighted retail basket (Truflation blog states retail-heavy weighting), so day-to-day index variance is small (last 10 weekly prints span only 2.855-2.860). Sigma=0.012 absorbs residual same-day publication-attribution risk and methodology updates while acknowledging that the underlying basket is structurally much more stable than the public chart's weekly-sampled jumps suggest.
notes: Settlement is the Truflation US CPI Eggs Index value attributed to 28-Apr-2026 (Kalshi reads next morning, 10:00 ET expiry). Refined anchor uses USDA AMS Daily National Shell Egg Index Report (28-Apr-2026, ams_2843.pdf) and the weekly Egg Markets Overview (24-Apr-2026, ams_3725.pdf) as alternative high-frequency cross-check on the weekly-sampled Truflation marketplace chart. USDA snapshot (cents/doz): caged Large White wtd avg 23.86 (+1.32 d/d), Extra Large 23.85 (-0.83); national loose Large 21.39 cpd 24-Apr (-4% w/w); CA cartoned benchmark 93 cpd (-4% w/w); breaking stock 7.75 cpd (-9%); retail features conventional caged $1.43 (-15%), UEP cage-free $2.60 (-11%); HPAI losses Apr-26 only 19,500 birds, 5 consecutive weeks with no new outbreaks. Direction signal: retail features and wholesale benchmarks softening modestly while production stabilizes. Anchor 2.857 (-0.002 vs published 2.859) with sigma 0.012 reflecting structural smoothness of Truflation retail basket. Probabilities are monotone non-increasing and clipped to [0.005, 0.995]. Confidence MEDIUM-HIGH; primary residual uncertainty is whether Truflation's daily methodology refresh attributed to 4/28 mirrors the public chart's last 2.859 print exactly (could differ by a few tenths of a cent if a new monthly retail-scrape window opened).
